title: chylismia brevipes subsp. pallidula
intro: Chylismia brevipes subsp. pallidula, also known as the pale evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Chylismia brevipes subsp. pallidula include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
